title: tragacantha puberula
intro: Tragacantha puberula, also known as Persian milk-vetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha puberula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
